# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'
    Properties: {}

  NatGWs:
    Type: 'Aware::EC2::NatGateways'
    Properties:
      AllocateElasticIpOnCreation: true
      NatGatewaySubnets:
        - SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
          PublicIpv4Addresses: 1
        - SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
          PublicIpv4Addresses: 1

  VPCRouteTables:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:!Sub "Private-RT-${AWS::StackName}"

  RouteTablesAssociations:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC::AssociateRouteTable'
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateSubnetARouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    DependsOn: InternetGateway
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: 'us-west-2a'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnetA

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    DependsOn: InternetGateway
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: 'us-west-2b'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnetB

  RouteTableAssociations:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC::AssociateRouteTable'
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateSubnetBRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB

  PrivateSubnetARouteTable:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC::RouteTable'
    DependsOn: NatGWs
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:!Sub "Private-RT-${AWS::StackName}"

  PrivateSubnetBRouteTable:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC::RouteTable'
    DependsOn: NatGWs
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:!Sub "Private-RT-${AWS::StackName}"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:!Sub "Public-RT-${AWS::StackName}"

  InternetGatewayAttachment:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC::AttachInternetGateway'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Route:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC::Route'
    DependsOn: InternetGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: The ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: The ID of the Internet Gateway
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway
